DS18B20_LABEL_SETUP: Setup (this is required to use other DS18B20 blocks)
DS18B20_CONSTRUCTOR_MESSAGE0: create $[CONSTRUCTED_VAR_NAME] DS18B20 on pin $[PIN] with resolution $[RESOLUTION]
DS18B20_CONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create a new DS18B20 temperature sensor instance
DS18B20_READ_TEMPERATURE_TOOLTIP: Read the current temperature in degrees Celsius
